overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white coat exploring a dimly lit industrial facility with metal walkways and staircases. The character meets a companion in a red shirt on an upper level before continuing alone through atmospheric corridors with overhead pipes and machinery.

entered.detail: green metal safety railing running along the left side of the walkway
metal mesh fencing enclosing the right side of the industrial area
steep metal stairs with railings leading to an upper level
orange and black diagonal hazard stripes painted on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial ground floor area with metal railings on the left and chain link fencing on the right. The environment features concrete flooring with hazard markings and a metal staircase visible ahead leading to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal staircase between ground and upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal stairs to reach the upper walkway

entered.detail: elevated concrete and metal walkway visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the metal staircase, moving from the ground floor toward the upper level. The stairway is enclosed with metal railings, and the upper walkway becomes visible as the character climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with view of factory floor below

events.description: reaches top of stairs and encounters companion in red shirt standing at railing
companion stops at railing while main character continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway with companion, looking down at the factory floor below

notable_agents.action: companion in red shirt walks alongside then stops at the railing to look down at the factory floor

thick industrial pipes and cables running along the ceiling
large support pillar for the upper walkway structure

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the character meets a companion in a red shirt. They walk together along the elevated walkway, looking down at the factory floor below. The companion stops at the railing while the main character continues forward under heavy overhead pipes.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial corridor with overhead pipe structures and red emergency lighting

events.description: lighting dims significantly as character enters darker corridor section
red emergency lights become visible illuminating distant machinery

agents.ego_description: walking alone through increasingly dark industrial corridors, passing under heavy overhead pipes and structures

entered.detail: red warning lights illuminating distant industrial machinery
narrow passage ahead with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The character continues alone through darker industrial corridors where the lighting dims significantly. Red emergency lights become visible in the distance, illuminating distant machinery. The walkway remains elevated with metal railings as the character passes under dense networks of overhead pipes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility that transitions from a concrete ground floor to a dark, atmospheric upper corridor. It begins on the ground level, moving past metal railings and chain link fencing across concrete floors marked with hazard stripes. As the camera ascends a metal staircase, the perspective rises toward an elevated walkway where the character meets a companion in a red shirt. The scene then shifts as they walk together along the railing overlooking the factory floor, before the companion stops and the character continues alone under a dense network of overhead pipes. Finally, the environment grows significantly darker, leading the camera deeper into industrial corridors illuminated only by distant red emergency lights reflecting off heavy machinery.
